description: Create a content slide titled 'What's going on' in a three-column layout with left and right text blocks and a center visual image column about smartphone and social media risks for children.

left.body: Finding the balance between letting children learn by experience and safeguarding them against harm has always been an underlying challenge for parents. In some situations, potential threats are obvious from a distance, giving parents time to intervene. But unlike physical hazards, many dangers of smartphones and social media for young people approach undetected, until the consequences become clear.

center.body: Central visual column featuring a stacked three-panel image illustrating hidden digital dangers facing children.

right.body: There are strong ties between this and other trends in this 2025 set: adults are coming to terms with the less favorable ways that digital technology has affected their lives, and they’re seeking both a cure for themselves and prevention for their children.
